ddls:
CREATE TABLE "constituencies" (
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constituency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the constituency */,
  "ac_no" INTEGER /* Assembly Constituency (AC) number */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of constituency (e.g., GEN, SC) */,
  "district" TEXT /* District the constituency belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the constituency */,
  "num_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates for mapping */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the districts table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constituency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constituencies_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party the candidate belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational qualification */,
  "previous_elections" INTEGER /* Number of previous elections contested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "party_leader" TEXT /* Name of the party leader */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Political ideology of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constituency the result belongs to */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning candidate */,
  "evm_votes" INTEGER /* Number of EVM votes received */,
  "postal_votes" INTEGER /* Number of postal votes received */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total votes received */,
  "vote_share" REAL /* Percentage of total votes received */,
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the election_cycles table */,
  "margin" INTEGER /* Margin by which the candidate won */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Voter turnout percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_cycle_id FOREIGN KEY ("cycle_id") REFERENCES election_cycles ("cycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_cycles" (
  "cycle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election cycle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the election cycle took place */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the election cycle */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the election cycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting method */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the voting method (e.g., EVM, Postal Votes) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the voting method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Foreign key to the districts table
ID of the party the candidate belongs to
Unique identifier for each election result
ID of the constituency the result belongs to
Foreign key to the election_cycles table
Margin by which the candidate won
Unique identifier for each election cycle
Year the election cycle took place
Start date of the election cycle
End date of the election cycle
Unique identifier for each voting method
Name of the voting method (e.g., EVM, Postal Votes)
Detailed description of the voting method
Area of the district in square kilometers
Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst)
Timestamp when the user account was created
